data.title: New Earth Resources Announces Approval of Application for Additional State Lease Lands Adjacent to Past-Producing Lucky Boy Uranium Project
data.description: Canada's New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) has received approval from the Arizona State Land Department for its request to acquire around 268 acres of state mineral lease land adjacent to its Lucky Boy Uranium Project. The approved application, following a February 12, 2026 news release, significantly expands the Company's land position in the Lucky Boy region, almost doubling its original size.
Ringkjøbing Landbobank A/S has released its Articles of Association with current numbers, without disclosing the source.

data.title: From Sick Care to Whole Health: 5 Forces Reshaping the Future of Healthcare
data.description: The Southern California University of Health Sciences has highlighted the factors driving the transition towards comprehensive care for individuals. Located in WHITTIER, Calif., the institution noted on May 1, 2026, that the healthcare sector is undergoing a transformation towards holistic practices that concentrate on all aspects of human well-being in addition to treating illnesses. This shift is propelled by various influences and is shaping the future of healthcare services.

data.title: Oberland Biotech GmbH Secures CHF 2.5 Million Seed Funding Round to Accelerate Global Expansion in Biotechnology and Food Innovation
data.description: A company specializing in biotechnology and nutritional food, Oberland Biotech GmbH, based in Zug, Switzerland, disclosed that they have recently accomplished a significant milestone by securing CHF 2.5 million in seed funding through a convertible instrument. This round of funding garnered support from 999 investors.

data.title: Why Did AIOS Tech Stock Jump Over 43% After Hours?
data.description: AIOS Tech Inc. (NASDAQ: AIOS) saw its shares jump by 43.24% to $13.35 in after-hours trading following the announcement of an upcoming extraordinary general meeting set for May 29 as per a recent Securities and Exchange Commission filing. The primary proposal for consideration involves a Class B Variation aiming to increase the voting ratio for Class B common shares substantially, from 5 votes per share to 100 votes per share. This will require the approval of shareholders, as well as the adoption of an amended and restated memorandum and articles of association by the company. Shareholders eligible to participate in the decision-making process were identified based on a record date set at April 29. Notably, both Class A and Class B shareholders retain the right to vote on the proposed changes. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
Trading halted for national holiday.
USD/JPY drops steeply, now at 155.9.

data.title: Riot Platforms VP Calls Firm's Bitcoin Reserve 'Most Capital-Efficient Source Of Funding' For Its Data Center Business
data.description: Riot Platforms Inc., listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RIOT, disclosed that they utilized their Bitcoin holdings to finance the development of their data center. According to Executive Vice President Jason Chung, the company relied heavily on their balance sheet for capital expenditure requirements. Chung highlighted during Riot's first-quarter earnings call that they funded the CapEx by selling a portion of their Bitcoin holdings, which is deemed the most capital-efficient funding source at their disposal. He emphasized that Riot did not have to issue any common equity during the quarter. This strategic move showcases the company's proactive approach in leveraging their assets to drive business growth.

data.title: XPENG Announces Vehicle Delivery Results for April 2026
data.description: XPeng Inc., a prominent global AI mobility technology firm, declared its vehicle delivery figures for April 2026 from Guangzhou, China. During the month, XPeng successfully delivered 31,011 vehicles to customers, reinforcing its position in the market. XPeng is listed on both NYSE under the ticker symbol XPEV and HKEX under 9868.

data.title: RWA market for tokenized assets surges 420% post-2025 due to regulatory clarity. US Treasurys see market cap rise to over $15B.
data.description: The market for tokenized US Treasurys experienced significant growth in the RWA sector, with market capitalization surging from $3.9 billion in early 2025 to over $15 billion.

data.title: Oobit introduces virtual Visa cards for USDT spending by AI agents. Limited rollout to select businesses; more to follow in the next two months.
data.description: On Thursday, the rollout of Agent Cards began for a exclusive group of businesses. A restricted number of additional companies will be granted access over the next sixty days.

data.title: The 6th Asian Beach Games Sanya 2026 conclude successfully
data.description: In Sanya, China, the 6th Asian Beach Games concluded with a closing ceremony on April 30, 2026, at Yasha Park in Sanya, Hainan. The ceremony titled "Starlit Night" focused on the themes of "Youth, Friendship, and Moving Forward." The event attracted significant attention, with attendees reflecting on the memorable moments of the games.
